chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.198 of 2017 Iqbal Ahmed Malik Versus Union National Bank Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution of appeal as notices not issued as copies not supplied by the advocate for the appellant. Dated: 15.01.2025 Mr. Saalim Salam Ansari for appellant. -.-.- Learned counsel for the appellant, at the very outset, has made a statement that the appellant is not in contact with him and he pleads no instruction. The appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending applications. Chief Justice Judge
